runs.note: Implemented secure refresh token rotation with: 1) Token rotation on every refresh, 2) Replay detection that revokes entire token families, 3) 90-day absolute lifetime checking, 4) Reduced access token lifetime to 5 minutes, 5) Comprehensive audit logging, and 6) Family-based revocation logic to prevent stolen token reuse.
